industrial.title: Industrial Facilities
industrial.desc: Factories, warehouses, logistics centers, and organized industrial zone structures. Engineering solutions tailored to sectoral needs.

renovation.title: Restoration & Renovation

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Shaping Ankara's skyline for 25 years
about.content:
AYT Group is a well-established company founded in Ankara in 2000, today ranking among Turkey's leading construction firms. With over 120 successful projects in residential, commercial, and industrial sectors, we have built hundreds of thousands of square metres of structures.

Built on the strong engineering foundation laid by our founders, the company now operates with more than 500 experienced technical experts and workers. Our ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and OHSAS 18001 certifications document our commitment to quality, environment, and occupational safety.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We apply the highest quality standards at every stage, from material selection to final handover, and we stand behind our work.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: The trust we have built with our clients over 25 years is our most valuable asset. We deliver what we promise.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: By following the latest technologies and methods in the industry, we add value to our projects and build tomorrow's structures today.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Through eco-friendly construction methods and energy-efficient designs, we fulfil our responsibility to nature and future generations.

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionContent: To transform our clients' dreams into reality through quality, safe, and on-time project delivery; to be an ethical, innovative, and sustainable model in Turkey's construction sector.
mission.visionContent: To rank among Turkey's top 10 construction companies by 2030 through domestic and international projects; to be recognised as an internationally standard, industry-leading brand.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Certificates that document our quality and reliability

iso9001.title: ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management System
iso9001.desc: ISO 9001 certification documenting that products and services are managed to international quality standards.

iso14001.title: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management System
iso14001.desc: ISO 14001 certification managing our environmental impacts and documenting sustainable practices.

ohsas18001.title: OHSAS 18001 Occupational Health & Safety
ohsas18001.desc: Document showing our compliance with international standards in employee health and occupational safety management.

tse.title: TSE Service Competence Certificate
tse.desc: Service quality and competence certificate issued by the Turkish Standards Institution.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from our satisfied clients
testimonials.testimonial1: Working with AYT Group is a privilege. Project management on the Söğütözü Plaza was excellent in terms of time and budget. Highly recommended.
testimonials.testimonial2: On our Etimesgut residential project, quality and reliability exceeded our expectations. Thank you for your client-focused approach.
testimonials.testimonial3: The professionalism and technical competence on the Sincan Logistics Center project were truly impressive. The AYT Group team supported us in every way.
